name: Italian Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, confectioners sugar, and almond extract until well combined.
2. Gradually add flour and slivered almonds to the mixture. Mix until all ingredients are incorporated and form a dough.
3. Shape the dough into small balls and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before rolling each cookie in confectioners sugar.
